title: avena × scholzii
intro: Avena × scholzii, also known as oat-grass hybrid, is a plant species that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The plant is said to have sedative and calming effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Avena × scholzii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to support overall well-being and improve sleep quality.
